title: HDF Energy and Southern Power Corporation (EVNSPC) Partner to Advance Green Hydrogen Power Development in Vietnam
content: In a significant step forward for Vietnam's clean energy ambitions, HDF Energy, a global pioneer in hydrogen power solutions, and Southern Power Corporation (EVNSPC), a subsidiary of Vietnam Electricity (EVN), have signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) to jointly explore the development of green hydrogen power projects. The collaboration will focus on remote islands in southern Vietnam.
author: Analysts Account
